name: Jampp
description: Mobile programmatic DSP using machine learning for app user acquisition, retargeting, and incremental growth.

seo.title: Jampp — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Jampp: Mobile programmatic DSP using machine learning for app user acquisition, retargeting, and incremental growth.

when_to_use: ML-powered programmatic app install campaigns with incremental lift focus
Retargeting dormant users with personalized app-specific creatives via DSP
Scaling Android UA across programmatic exchanges with smart bidding
Measuring incrementality of paid UA spend vs organic baseline

pros: ML-driven UA with incremental lift focus
Strong in LATAM and emerging markets
cons: Now part of Affle, strategic direction shifting
Smaller scale than Moloco or Liftoff
review.verdict: Reliable mid-tier mobile DSP with LATAM strength, but outsized by larger ML-first rivals.
review.best_for: Apps targeting LATAM growth with incrementality-minded media buying.
review.not_for: Western-only apps needing top-tier scale and SKAN innovation velocity.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
